title: Impact Signal View - Metrics, Outcomes, and Engineering Performance
content:
Delivery and performance metrics:
- Reduced ML inference latency from 450ms to under 90ms through batching and model optimization.
- Improved workflow efficiency by 30-40% across NLP and document-processing pipelines.
- Reduced manual legal/compliance review effort by ~35% with production NLP pipelines.
- Reduced p99 latency by 40% and cut monthly cloud cost by 25% via AWS inference architecture changes.
- Processed 1M+ text records/day in distributed PySpark workflows with stable throughput.

Infrastructure and reliability metrics:
- Built and operates Batcave with 56 containers and 36+ services on a hybrid-cloud architecture.
- Reported platform uptime target/achievement around 99.9% in home-lab operations.
- Supports a 177GB multi-database data layer (PostgreSQL, MariaDB, Redis, SQLite) for retrieval and inference workloads.

Automation and quality signals:
- Processed 10,000+ audio files with approximately 95% deduplication accuracy in automation pipelines.
- Built document AI pipeline with ~98% OCR accuracy in RAG-powered media workflow.
- Implemented model-rigor practices including cross-validation, ablations, and SHAP-based interpretability in production delivery contexts.
